category.description: The classification category for the article

reasoning.description: A brief explanation (1-2 sentences) for why this article was classified into the chosen category, citing specific evidence from the headline and body

startup_name.description: The name of the startup (company name only, no additional text). Only provide if the article is about a single company's funding round. Leave empty for VC Fund Announcements, Roundup articles, or None of the above.

amount_known.description: True if the funding amount can be determined from the article. False if the amount is not disclosed or unclear.

amount_raised.description: The funding amount in the original format with 'm' suffix (e.g., '20m', '15.5m', '7.1m'). Only provide if amount_known is true. Round to two significant digits.

currency_raised.description: The currency code of the original funding amount (e.g., 'USD', 'EUR', 'GBP'). Only provide if amount_known is true.

usd_equivalent.description: The USD equivalent of the funding amount with $ symbol and 'm' suffix (e.g., '$20m', '$8.4m'). Only provide if amount_known is true. Round to two significant digits. If the original currency is USD, this should match the amount_raised with $ prefix.

likely_press_release.description: True if the article appears to be a press release rather than original journalism. False if it appears to be independently reported news.
